text:
Mood: Feeling tired or having little energy: P (D) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient expressed that in the last two weeks they have been feeling tired or having little energy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
9 = No response 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
^ = Blank
